summary: Executed backend API regression tests and frontend Playwright smoke/integration checks for homepage navigation and contact form.

issues: Preferred Start Date uses native browser date input (data-testid=contact-start-date-input) instead of a custom consistent date picker component; can cause inconsistent UX across browsers.

action_items: If consistent cross-browser UX is required, replace native date input with app-level date picker component.
Add SMTP_EMAIL and SMTP_APP_PASSWORD in backend/.env to enable successful contact email delivery path.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact API correctly gates missing SMTP credentials with clear 500 detail; expected in current environment.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly for contact submission endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints /api/ and /api/contact validation+SMTP-config error path are covered in pytest file. Frontend smoke confirms sticky nav, section jumps, and form editability on public URL.
rca of the issue: No functional bug found in required scope. SMTP success path is intentionally blocked because SMTP_EMAIL and SMTP_APP_PASSWORD are not configured; backend raises RuntimeError in _get_smtp_credentials() and converts to HTTP 500 as designed.
